subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from the Wronged One directed towards such servants as have turned unto the Truth, whilst the clamor of men hath failed to deter them [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: این کتابیست از نزد مظلوم بسوی عبادیکه بحق اقبال نموده اند و ضوضای خلق ایشان
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @the power of words; of speech, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
